name: kioku-wiki
description: Read, search, and write your KIOKU Obsidian Wiki from Claude Desktop or Claude Code.
long_description: KIOKU is a personal knowledge base ('second brain') built on top of an Obsidian Vault. This MCP server exposes eight tools (kioku_search, kioku_read, kioku_list, kioku_write_note, kioku_write_wiki, kioku_delete, kioku_ingest_pdf, kioku_ingest_url) so that Claude Desktop and Claude Code can browse and update the Wiki without leaving the chat. All operations are local stdio — nothing leaves your machine. See https://github.com/megaphone-tokyo/kioku for the full project.

vault_path.title: Obsidian Vault directory
vault_path.description: Path to your KIOKU Vault — the directory that contains wiki/, session-logs/, raw-sources/. If you have not created a Vault yet, run scripts/setup-vault.sh from the kioku repo first.

tools.name: kioku_search
tools.description: Full-text search across the Wiki (delegates to qmd CLI when available, falls back to a Node grep).

tools.name: kioku_read
tools.description: Return the contents of wiki/<path>.md (capped at 256 KB).

tools.name: kioku_list
tools.description: List the wiki/ directory tree (depth 1-5, max 1000 entries).

tools.name: kioku_write_note
tools.description: Append a memo to session-logs/. The next auto-ingest cycle structures it into wiki/. Recommended default.

tools.name: kioku_write_wiki
tools.description: Write directly into wiki/ (template + frontmatter + wikilink injection, flock-protected). Use only when immediate publication is required.

tools.name: kioku_delete
tools.description: Move a wiki page to wiki/.archive/ (recoverable). wiki/index.md is protected.

tools.name: kioku_ingest_pdf
tools.description: Trigger immediate ingest for a PDF or markdown file under raw-sources/. Short PDFs (<=15 pages) block until summaries are produced (status: extracted_and_summarized). Longer PDFs return status: queued_for_summary and produce summaries in the background (1-3 min); poll wiki/summaries/ (expected_summaries) to retrieve them.

tools.name: kioku_ingest_url
tools.description: Fetch an HTTP/HTTPS URL, extract article body (Mozilla Readability with LLM fallback), save Markdown + images under raw-sources/<subdir>/fetched/. PDF URLs auto-dispatch to kioku_ingest_pdf. Long PDFs return status: dispatched_to_pdf_queued while summary is produced in the background.
